sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96409" key="steile/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειλέα</orth>, <sense id="n96409.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελεά</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειλειάριον</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελεός</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειλειή</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελεά</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειλειόν</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελεόν</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στειλεός</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στελεός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
